channel.title: Crunchbase News
channel.description: Data-driven reporting on private markets, startups, founders, and investors

item.title: The Week’s 10 Biggest Funding Rounds: NinjaOne Leads With $400M As Large Deals Also Go To Blockchain, Cloud Infrastructure, Biotech And Robotics
item.dc:creator: Joanna Glasner
item.description: NinjaOne raised $400M in a Series E led by Iconiq Growth, bringing its valuation to $5B.
item.content:encoded: NinjaOne raised $400M in a Series E led by Iconiq Growth, bringing its valuation to $5B.

item.title: Base10 Partners Closes 2 Funds Totaling $850M To Invest In Real Economy Automation
item.dc:creator: Joanna Glasner
item.description: Base10 Partners closes two funds — a $650M growth fund and a $200M seed fund — targeting real economy automation.
item.content:encoded: Base10 Partners closes two funds — a $650M growth fund and a $200M seed fund — targeting real economy automation.

item.title: Sector Snapshot: Semiconductor Startup Funding Still Running Hot
item.dc:creator: Gené Teare
item.description: Chip startups raised $4B in Q1 2026, a record for the sector, led by AI inference hardware companies.
item.content:encoded: Chip startups raised $4B in Q1 2026, a record for the sector, led by AI inference hardware companies.

item.title: The Week’s 10 Biggest Funding Rounds: Megarounds Proliferate, Led By Enterprise Software, AI, And Space
item.dc:creator: Joanna Glasner
item.description: This week’s biggest funding rounds were led by enterprise software, AI, and space companies.
item.content:encoded: This week's biggest funding rounds were led by enterprise software, AI, and space companies.

item.title: SpaceX Shares Close Up 19% After Largest IPO Of All Time
item.dc:creator: Chris Metinko
item.description: SpaceX shares surged 19% on opening day of trading after its record-breaking IPO priced at $185 per share.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX shares surged 19% on opening day of trading after its record-breaking IPO priced at $185 per share.

item.title: Before You Cheer The IPO Window, Watch Where The Money Goes
item.dc:creator: Gené Teare
item.description: The reopening IPO window is exciting, but founders and investors should pay attention to where liquidity ultimately flows.
item.content:encoded: The reopening IPO window is exciting, but founders and investors should pay attention to where liquidity ultimately flows.

item.title: The Crunchbase Tech Layoffs Tracker
item.dc:creator: Joanna Glasner
item.description: Thousands of tech employees have been laid off in 2026. Crunchbase News is tracking the major layoff announcements.
item.content:encoded: Thousands of tech employees have been laid off in 2026. Crunchbase News is tracking the major layoff announcements.

item.title: How Bigger ACVs Are Bringing Direct Sales Back To Vertical AI
item.dc:creator: Gené Teare
item.description: As vertical AI companies command higher annual contract values, enterprise sales motions are making a comeback.
item.content:encoded: As vertical AI companies command higher annual contract values, enterprise sales motions are making a comeback.
